## What does this change?


## How was it tested?

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (if behaviour changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] No API keys / bot tokens are logged or shown to the renderer
- [ ] Subprocesses are spawned with an args array (no shell strings from input)
- [ ] Matches the existing vanilla-JS style
